---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Area

- [ ] CLI (terminal UI)
- [ ] Web (browser UI)
- [ ] AWS logic (credentials, tokens)

## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work? (Optional)
